name: Black Gold Gas & Oil, Inc.
summary: Black Gold Gas & Oil, Inc., a natural resources company, provides exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties. It also involves in forestry, timber production and reseeding of forests, and copper mining, as well as the operation of equipment manufacturing plants. The company also offers oilfield services and international oil refining. Black Gold Gas & Oil, Inc. is based in Plantation, Florida.
